title: Mellow Spanish Potato Patatas Bravas
description: A brunch-friendly take on classic patatas bravas, featuring fluffy fried potatoes topped with a smoky tomato sauce and crunchy toffee popcorn. This version keeps the dish raw-friendly and adds a sweet crunch.
instructions: Peel and dice 800g potatoes into bite-sized cubes.
In a large bowl, toss potatoes with 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp sea salt, and 1 tsp smoked paprika until evenly coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add the seasoned potatoes.
Cook the potatoes, stirring occasionally, for 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
While the potatoes are frying, combine 200g tomato passata, 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar, 1 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp tomato paste, and a minced clove of garlic in a saucepan.
Simmer the tomato mixture over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it thickens slightly.
Once the potatoes are done, remove them from the skillet and transfer to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the hot tomato sauce over the crispy potatoes and sprinkle with finely chopped parsley.
Fold in 50g shredded toffee popcorn for a sweet, crunchy contrast.
Serve immediately, optionally with a side of fresh lemon wedges.
